On Sun, Jul 23, 2000 at 11:04:44PM -0400, howardjp@wam.umd.edu wrote:
> -WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/expect-5.31
> +WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/expect-5.32

WRKSRC=${WRKDIR}/${PKGNAME} by default.  So we don't need this line.  :-)
